title: Trusted by
subtitle: Join hundreds of real estate professionals who've elevated their marketing with SnapKaza.

items.name: Sofia Mendes
items.quote: SnapKaza transformed our listing presentations completely. Properties that sat for months now sell within weeks. The AI videos are absolutely stunning.

items.name: Miguel Santos
items.quote: The virtual staging saves us thousands per listing. Our clients can't believe the quality—many think we hired professional photographers.

items.name: Ana Costa
items.quote: The AI narration in Portuguese is perfect. It's like having a professional voiceover artist on demand. Game-changer for international buyers.

items.name: João Ferreira
items.quote: 24-hour turnaround is incredible. I can photograph a property in the morning and have professional marketing materials by the next day.
